Politics.headline: New Report on Pay Equity Draws Political Attention
Politics.detail: A new report from the People's Select Committee examining changes to New Zealand's pay equity framework has been launched, drawing support from the Green Party and renewed focus on workplace fairness. The report assesses how recent legislative changes have affected the ability of workers to pursue pay equity claims.

Politics.headline: Beaches reopen - rāhui partially lifted
Politics.detail: From midday Wednesday 25 February 2026 the public health advice on the beaches and water on Wellington's south coast has changed, and people can now go on the beaches and swim near the shore in the area from Ōwhiro Bay to Breaker Bay. Mana Whenua has also confirmed a partial lifting of the rāhui on the south coast, but it remains solely over Tarakena Bay and the immediate vicinity of the short outfall.

Politics.headline: Top News Headlines In Cambodia, Indonesia, Laos, Philippines, Singapore, & Vietnam
Politics.detail: Hundreds of AI-generated, Chinese-language YouTube videos have been targeting Singapore and Prime Minister Lawrence Wong as part of an ongoing disinformation campaign, CNA has found.  Finance Minister Purbaya Yudhi Sadewa agreed to postpone a plan to import 105,000 pickup trucks from India for the Merah Putih Village Cooperative program.

Politics.headline: Mandelson complains arrest followed 'baseless suggestion' he was about to flee the country – UK politics as it happened
Politics.detail: Peter Mandelson, the former UK ambassador to the U.S., complains his arrest followed a baseless suggestion he was about to flee the country. He was arrested amid revelations over his ties to Jeffrey Epstein.

Politics.headline: Senate committee recommends removing broad immigration powers from border bill
Politics.detail: A Canadian Senate committee has recommended removing broad immigration powers from a border bill. The Canadian federal government is seeking input to develop a men's and boys' health strategy.

Finance & Economy.headline: Meta agrees $60bn deal with chipmaker AMD despite AI bubble fears
Finance & Economy.detail: Meta has agreed to a $60 billion deal with chipmaker AMD, despite concerns about an AI bubble.

Finance & Economy.headline: Young are bearing the brunt of UK tax and wage changes, says BoE economist
Finance & Economy.detail: A Bank of England economist suggests that young people are disproportionately affected by recent tax and wage changes in the UK.

Finance & Economy.headline: US stocks drop after Trump ramps up his tariffs and investors dump potential AI losers
Finance & Economy.detail: US stocks declined following increased tariffs by Trump and investors selling off potential AI losing stocks.

Finance & Economy.headline: UK data watchdog fines Reddit £14 million over child user protection
Finance & Economy.detail: Reddit has been fined over £14 million by the UK data watchdog for failing to protect child users on its platform.

Finance & Economy.headline: Passenger numbers at UK airports hit record of 302 million in 2025
Finance & Economy.detail: In 2025, UK airports saw a record 302 million passengers, a 2.4% increase from the previous year.

Technology.headline: Meta agrees $60bn deal with chipmaker AMD despite AI bubble fears
Technology.detail: Meta has agreed to a $60 billion deal with chipmaker AMD, signaling confidence in long-term AI investments despite concerns about an AI bubble.

Technology.headline: US AI giant accuses Chinese rivals of mass data theft
Technology.detail: Anthropic, a US-based AI company, has accused its Chinese rivals of engaging in mass data theft to gain an advantage in the rapidly evolving AI landscape.

Technology.headline: Reddit fined £14.5m in UK over use of under-13s' data
Technology.detail: Reddit has been fined £14.5 million in the UK for violating data protection laws related to the use of data from children under the age of 13.

Technology.headline: YouTube executive says goal was viewer value, not addiction
Technology.detail: A YouTube executive stated that the company's primary goal is to provide value to viewers, rather than creating addictive content.

Technology.headline: iQOO 15R with Snapdragon 8 Gen 5, 7,600mAh battery launched in India starting at Rs 44,999
Technology.detail: iQOO has launched its new 15R smartphone in India, featuring a Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 processor and a large 7,600mAh battery, with a starting price of Rs 44,999.

Science.headline: Scientists Find Genetic 'Switch' in Mice That Turns Caring Dads into Violent Brutes
Science.detail: A new study suggests that the Agouti gene in the brains of male African striped mice can act as a molecular "switch," making them caring or violent toward their young.

Science.headline: Webb Maps Uranus' Upper Atmosphere and Finds a Magnetic Surprise
Science.detail: Webb just revealed Uranus's upper atmosphere in 3D, exposing wild auroras and a planet that exhibits unexpected magnetic phenomena.

Science.headline: Early Triassic Fossils from Australia Uncover Diverse Marine Amphibian Community
Science.detail: Fossils discovered in Australia reveal a diverse community of marine amphibians that lived during the Early Triassic period.

Science.headline: Virgin Olive Oil Tied to Slower Cognitive Decline through Gut Microbiome Changes
Science.detail: A recent study suggests that consuming virgin olive oil is associated with a slower rate of cognitive decline, potentially due to changes in the gut microbiome.

Science.headline: AI-powered platform accelerates discovery of new mRNA delivery materials
Science.detail: A new AI platform is speeding up the process of discovering novel materials for mRNA delivery, potentially revolutionizing vaccine and therapeutic development.

Health.headline: Half of Britons avoid calling GP when they are ill, survey finds
Health.detail: A recent survey reveals that a significant portion of Britons are avoiding contacting their general practitioner when they experience illness, raising concerns about potential delays in diagnosis and treatment.

Health.headline: Obstructive sleep apnoea costs UK and US economies £137bn a year, research finds
Health.detail: New research indicates that obstructive sleep apnea is creating a substantial economic burden on both the UK and the US, with estimated costs reaching £137 billion annually.

Health.headline: Intermittent Fasting Offers No Clear Advantage
Health.detail: Analysis of 22 randomized trials finds intermittent fasting produces modest weight loss comparable to standard calorie-restricted diets and shows no clear quality-of-life benefit.

Health.headline: What to Know About Chronic Cough in Patients Taking GLP-1s
Health.detail: A recent article discusses the potential link between GLP-1 medications and chronic cough in patients, providing insights for healthcare professionals.

Health.headline: Infographics engage unmotivated young adults in healthy eating.
Health.detail: A study suggests that using infographics can be an effective way to engage young adults who are typically unmotivated to adopt healthy eating habits.

Sports.headline: Hughes' OT goal for Team USA vs Canada in Olympic final averages 26M live viewers on NBC, Peacock
Sports.detail: The thrilling final match between the USA and Canada in the Olympics captivated a large audience across both traditional television and streaming platforms.

Sports.headline: 2026 NCAA Tournament Projections: How the Big Ten Can Become an 11-Bid Conference
Sports.detail: An in-depth look at the potential for the Big Ten conference to receive a record number of bids to the 2026 NCAA Men's Basketball Tournament.

Sports.headline: Mayweather and Pacquiao to fight in September rematch on Netflix
Sports.detail: Floyd Mayweather and Manny Pacquiao will have a rematch in September, which will be aired on Netflix.

Sports.headline: Akari rediscovers energy, stuns Nxled on the way to first victory
Sports.detail: Akari rediscovered its energy and stunned Nxled on the way to their first victory.

Sports.headline: Ranji final: Shubham Pundir's unbeaten 115, Yawer Hassan's 88 help J&K land first blows on Karnataka, as visitors cruise to 284/2
Sports.detail: Shubham Pundir's unbeaten 115 and Yawer Hassan's 88 helped J&K land first blows on Karnataka as visitors cruise to 284/2.

Entertainment.headline: Robert Carradine, ‘Lizzie McGuire’ and ‘Revenge of the Nerds’ star, dead at 71
Entertainment.detail: Actor Robert Carradine, best known for his roles in 'Lizzie McGuire' and 'Revenge of the Nerds,' has passed away at the age of 71. His cause of death is currently unknown.

Entertainment.headline: Martin Short Comedy Shows delayed after daughter's death
Entertainment.detail: Following the death of Martin Short's daughter, Katherine Short, at the age of 42, his comedy shows have been delayed. The cause of death was not immediately available.

Entertainment.headline: BAFTA and BBC apologize for racial slur during awards show
Entertainment.detail: The BAFTAs and BBC have issued an apology after a racial slur was used during the awards show. Details about the specific incident were not immediately available.

Entertainment.headline: Nick Reiner pleads not guilty to murder
Entertainment.detail: Nick Reiner, the son of Rob Reiner and Michele Singer Reiner, has pleaded not guilty in Los Angeles to the killing of his parents. The case is ongoing.

Entertainment.headline: Mariah Carey has released her 16th studio album, “Here for It All,” marking a new chapter in her career
Entertainment.detail: Mariah Carey has released her 16th studio album, “Here for It All,” marking a new chapter in her career. This 11-track album showcases Carey's evolution as an artist and blends soulful records, R&B, ballads and pop.

Crime & Justice.headline: Man allegedly rams two police cars after running red lights
Crime & Justice.detail: A man was arrested in Auckland after he allegedly rammed two police cars with a van after running through red lights; one police vehicle was extensively damaged, but no officers were injured. The 23-year-old will appear in Manukau District Court charged with assault with intent to injure, intentional damage, dangerous driving, resisting police, and failing to stop.

Crime & Justice.headline: Trial for men accused of perverting justice in Alan Hall case further delayed
Crime & Justice.detail: The High Court trial of two men facing charges of wilfully perverting the course of justice over the conviction of Alan Hall has been further delayed because one defendant was too ill to attend. Alan Hall spent 19 years in jail for the murder of Arthur Easton in 1985, before his conviction was quashed in 2022.

Crime & Justice.headline: Deputy PM Unveils Vision for Justice System
Crime & Justice.detail: The Deputy Prime Minister in the UK has outlined plans for a 'transformed' justice system, including a new AI courts assistant and a National Listing Framework to standardize listing processes and limit delays for victims. Beginning in April 2026, 'Blitz' courts in London will focus on clearing the backlog of assault cases against emergency workers.

Crime & Justice.headline: Brazil: Marielle Franco and Mãe Bernadette murder trials will test state's resolve to deliver justice for human rights defenders
Crime & Justice.detail: Amnesty International reports that Brazil faces a decisive test of its willingness to confront impunity for attacks against human rights defenders as trials begin for the murders of Marielle Franco, Anderson Gomes and Maria Bernadete Pacífico. The trials, taking place in February 2026, are long overdue and highlight the Brazilian justice system's failure to provide swift and effective responses to victims.

Crime & Justice.headline: Peel Police Arrest Four Individuals in Human Trafficking Investigation
Crime & Justice.detail: Peel Regional Police have arrested and charged four individuals in connection with a human trafficking investigation involving young female victims aged 11 to 14. The suspects allegedly used coercion, manipulation, and threats to control the victims and benefit financially from their exploitation in the Greater Toronto Area.

Education.headline: Education minister to launch 'No Child Left Behind' campaign today
Education.detail: The Federal Education Minister is launching a 'No Child Left Behind' campaign to increase educational access and bring out-of-school children back to schools, alongside implementing an Action Plan for out-of-school children (OOSC) 2025-2030.

Education.headline: School Assembly News Headlines Today – February 25, 2026 | National, International, Education & Sports Updates
Education.detail: Important news headlines for school assembly on February 25, 2026, including national progress in infrastructure and economic development, expansion of renewable energy capacity, promotion of digital governance and financial inclusion, and focus on crop diversification and public health awareness.

Education.headline: Today News Headlines for School Assembly, February 25, 2026: Kerala to be renamed as 'Keralam', Govt to run HPV vaccination drive
Education.detail: Top news for school assembly on February 25, 2026, includes the approval to rename Kerala as Keralam and a nationwide HPV vaccination drive.

Education.headline: School assembly news headlines, February 25: Top India, world, sports, business news
Education.detail: Key news events from February 24, 2026, including a fatal air crash in Jharkhand, rising global trade tensions, and key geopolitical and business shifts, along with sports updates and technical faults in Air India aircraft.

Education.headline: MOE to Continue Recruiting Foreign English Teaching Talent in 2026
Education.detail: Taiwan's Ministry of Education will continue the Taiwan Foreign English Teacher Program (TFETP) in 2026 to advance the Bilingual 2030 Policy, inviting qualified applicants to teach in Taiwan and bring English into students' daily learning experiences.

Lifestyle.headline: US retailer copies Target with new 'deal bar' featuring affordable items in stores
Lifestyle.detail: Kohl's has launched a new Deal Bar, a front-of-store section offering a rotating selection of trendy gifts, seasonal items, and everyday essentials priced at $10 or less, reminiscent of Target's Bullseye's Playground & Dollar Spot. These Deal Bars have been installed at the entrance of all Kohl's locations nationwide, designed to appeal to cost-conscious shoppers with small-ticket items.

Lifestyle.headline: A growing lifestyle trend among seniors explains why more “cumulants” are choosing to work after retirement just to make ends meet
Lifestyle.detail: More than 50% of seniors are re-entering the workforce due to insufficient retirement savings, and 27% are doing so to manage the increasing cost of living. This trend is attributed to the decline of traditional pension plans and stagnant wages.

Lifestyle.headline: Trying to lose weight? Experts say this simple morning habit may help more than you think
Lifestyle.detail: Nutrition experts suggest that consistently eating breakfast can make weight loss easier, as skipping it may lead to overeating, blood sugar spikes, and poorer food choices later in the day. Registered dietitians suggest that not skipping breakfast may actually make weight loss easier to sustain.

Lifestyle.headline: Harrogate Town Women to face Leeds United
Lifestyle.detail: Harrogate Town Women are scheduled to play against Leeds United. This is a local sports news item from Harrogate, UK.

Lifestyle.headline: South Korea's top TV networks sue OpenAI for training ChatGPT with their news
Lifestyle.detail: South Korean TV networks are suing OpenAI for using their news content to train ChatGPT. This legal action highlights concerns about copyright and the use of news articles in AI training.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Senate damaging its own credibility with inaction on dela Rosa
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Senate's inaction regarding Senator dela Rosa's absences undermines public trust, especially as he misses important work on fiscal measures, anti-corruption laws, and a potential impeachment trial. His behavior contrasts poorly with others facing allegations, further damaging the Senate's credibility.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Letters to The Editor — February 25, 2026
Opinion/Editorial.detail: A letter criticizes U.S. President Donald Trump's imposition of tariffs, applauding the Supreme Court's decision to strike them down. The author suggests Trump's actions reflect a dictatorial approach, expressing hope that he will recognize the folly of his ways.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL - EDSA@40
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Catholic Bishops' Conference of the Philippines has warned that the country is facing a new threat, days before the 40th anniversary of the people power revolt. The editorial likely reflects on the significance of the EDSA revolution and current challenges facing the Philippines.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Africa must boycott the 2026 World Cup
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Al Jazeera posits that Africa faces a significant sporting and moral decision regarding the US-hosted 2026 World Cup. The piece suggests reasons why a boycott might be considered, likely related to ethical or political concerns.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: 'Paralysis' in PH economic development and poverty reduction
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Inquirer.net discusses the 'paralysis' affecting economic development and efforts to reduce poverty in the Philippines. The opinion piece likely analyzes the factors contributing to this stagnation and proposes potential solutions.

World.headline: At least 23 dead as heavy rains unleash floods in southeastern Brazil
World.detail: Heavy rains in southeastern Brazil have caused floods and landslides, resulting in at least 23 fatalities as of today.

World.headline: US Department of Justice sues UCLA over anti-Semitism allegations
World.detail: The US Department of Justice is suing UCLA over alleged antisemitism amid pro-Palestinian protests, marking a significant development in the ongoing debate surrounding free speech and discrimination on college campuses.

World.headline: Mandelson accuses police of arresting him over 'baseless' claims he planned to flee abroad
World.detail: Peter Mandelson, a former UK ambassador, has accused the police of arresting him based on 'baseless' suggestions that he was planning to flee the country.

World.headline: Russia 'has not won' as Ukraine war enters fifth year, Zelenskyy says
World.detail: As the war in Ukraine enters its fifth year, President Zelenskyy asserts that Russia has not achieved victory, highlighting the ongoing resilience and determination of the Ukrainian people.

World.headline: Former U.K. ambassador to U.S. Peter Mandelson arrested
World.detail: Peter Mandelson, the former U.K. ambassador to the U.S., was arrested following the release of emails between him and Jeffrey Epstein.

Zimbabwe.headline: Kombi driver jailed 3 years for sexually abusing child kidnap teen
Zimbabwe.detail: A kombi driver was sentenced to three years in jail for sexually abusing a teenager who had been kidnapped in Bulawayo.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zanu PF Harare spokesperson wanted in South Africa after skipping bail
Zimbabwe.detail: Joachim Chivayo, the Zanu PF Harare spokesperson, is wanted in South Africa after fleeing to Zimbabwe in connection with a R15 million illegal gold dealing case.

Zimbabwe.headline: Chatunga Mugabe to stay in jail until at least March 3 after court hearing
Zimbabwe.detail: Chatunga Mugabe is set to remain in jail until at least March 3 following a court hearing related to an incident in Johannesburg.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe rejects $350m US health deal, citing sovereignty concerns
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe has rejected a $350 million health deal with the United States, raising concerns about sovereignty.

Zimbabwe.headline: Dipping programme gets major boost
Zimbabwe.detail: A dipping programme has received a significant boost, though further details were not specified in the snippet.
